action.reasoning: Observation: train failed with ModuleNotFoundError for xgboost (not preinstalled); prior best MAE=0.2188 from RF on Morgan FP, MLP was worse at 0.231. Analysis: XGB should outperform RF on this tabular FP regression task (boosting handles high-dim sparse data well); existing model/train/predict code is ready for it once installed, FP computation is slow but was acceptable before. Decision: install xgboost, run current train.py (n_est=300,depth=9,lr=0.1 on full data) to train+save pkl, submit_eval immediately for new score and iter timing before further improvements (e.g. more estimators, Mordred feats or fixing GNN).
